title: July 12
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 12''' is the 193rd day (194th in leap years) of the year, with 172 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1943|1943]] – [[Walter Murch]] is born.
*[[1940s#1948|1948]] – [[Ben Burtt]] is born.
*[[1975]] – [[Phil Lord]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 4|''Star Wars'' (1977) 4]] published. The cover date is October.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 23|''Star Wars Weekly'' 23]] published.
*[[1979]] – [[Omid Abtahi]] is born.
*[[1989]] – [[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']] opens at [[Tokyo Disneyland]].
*[[2006]] – [[Legacy (2006) 2|''Legacy'' (2006) 2]] published.
*[[2016]] – ''[[Star Wars: I Am a Sith]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 9|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 9]] published.
*2017 – [[Darth Vader (2017) 3|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 3]] published.
*[[2019]] – "[[Han and Chewie - A Lifelong Partnership]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2022]] – ''[[Ronin: A Visions Novel]]'' published in paperback.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars: Be More Obi-Wan]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Baking]]'' Gift Set edition published.
*[[2023]] – [[Bounty Hunters 36|''Bounty Hunters'' 36]] published.
*2023 – [[Darth Vader (2020) 36|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 36]] published.
*[[2024]] – ''[[Shadows of the Galaxy]]'' published.
*2024 – "[[RJ Fixes the Speeder]]" released on [[StarWarsKids.com]].
<noinclude>
